title: PROSPECTS OF THE GLOBAL ECONOMIC FINANCIAL CRISIS (LITERATURE REVIEW)
author: Mustafayev T.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article presents an overview of the literature data on the development, history, and overcoming of the global economic financial crisis (GEFC). The prevalence of the financial crisis currently in many countries of the world, its level of development, the nature of preventive measures taken by economists, and overcoming this crisis remain an urgent problem today. According to research by economists, this is the first time in the last 10 years when, according to statistics, due to the global crisis, the economy in the United States shrank by 31.7%, in the UK- by 24%, in Spain - by 22.1%, in France - by 19.2%, in Turkey - by 9.9%, in In Russia - by 8.5%, and in Azerbaijan - by 7.2%. It is for this reason that the countries of the world, including our republic, are taking various steps in the field of rescue from the financial crisis, purposefully using the material and financial resources available to them. The countries of the world, as well as our Republic, have developed unique models for overcoming the crisis, and anti-crisis steps taken within the framework of these models, timely identifying the causes and nature of the crisis, reducing the scale of the GEFC, preventing possible price increases and damage.

keywords: economic crisis, financial crisis, anti-crisis steps, technological progress, international trade relations, banking sector
